message:
fix: resolve hive-mind wizard Claude spawning and performance messages

- Fixed hive-mind wizard to properly spawn Claude Code instances with coordination
- Removed noisy "Performance auto-tuned: concurrency_decreased" console messages
- Wizard now injects objectives into Claude Code prompt correctly
- Added debug logging for objective tracking
- Maintains auto-performance tuning functionality without console spam

Fixes: ruvnet/claude-flow#330
